content: Phase 1: Orders POC + Orders screen (Phase 1 delivery)
Phase 2A: India localization (INR, IST, en-IN formatting, Indian sample data)
Phase 2B: Backend routers for producers, inventory, batches, production, procurement, dispatch, store, reports, dashboard

Phase 2C: Frontend pages — Dashboard, Inventory, Production, Procurement, Warehouse, Dispatch, Producers, Store, Reports, Settings + reusable component library (AppShell/KPICard/ActivityFeed/SlideOver/EmptyState/SearchInput)
Phase 2D: Sidebar navigation + routing across all 11 Graamam screens
Phase 3: End-to-end testing (SKIPPED per user request — to be run when user says go)
Phase 4: Firebase Auth + Firestore swap + deployment (last phase, planned)
